mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, f.file_path, n.link_url, n.status, n.start_date, n.end_date, n.priority, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM notice n LEFT JOIN file f ON n.id = f.target_id AND f.target_type = 'NOTICE' ORDER BY status DESC, priority DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT n.id, n.title, f.file_path, n.link_url, n.status, n.start_date, n.end_date, n.priority, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM notice n LEFT JOIN file f ON n.id = f.target_id AND f.target_type = 'NOTICE' ORDER BY status DESC, priority DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT n.id, n.title, f.file_path, n.link_url, n.status, n.start_date, n.end_date, n.priority, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM notice n LEFT JOIN file f ON n.id = f.target_id AND f.target_type = 'NOTICE' WHERE n.status='Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN start_date AND end_date ORDER BY priority DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, link_url, status, start_date, end_date, priority, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{linkUrl}, 'Y', #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{priority}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, status = #{status}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, priority = #{priority}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.link_url, n.status, n.start_date, n.end_date, n.priority, n.created_at, n.updated_at, f.file_path FROM notice n LEFT JOIN file f ON n.id = f.target_id AND f.target_type = 'NOTICE' WHERE n.id = #{id}
